message:
fix(ext-conformance): remove built-in-pi-mono tier assertion

Built-in extensions (diff, files, prompt-url-widget, redraws) are
classified under "official-pi-mono" in the validated manifest, so the
separate "built-in-pi-mono" tier assertion was always failing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
